name: Macaroni Grill's Pasta Di Polla Al Sugo Bianco
recipeInstructions:
To Make the Sauce: Heat the heavy cream to a very hot, bubbly temperature. Add the chicken base and cheese, stirring constantly with a wire whip until just back to a gentle bubble. Dissolve cornstarch in cold water, then add it to the sauce. Bring to a slow simmer to cook out the starch. Transfer to a container, cover, and refrigerate.
To Make the Pasta Dish: Heat butter in a pan and sauté red onions for a few seconds. Add pancetta and garlic, then chicken, green onions, and pasta. Deglaze with cream, add asiago sauce, and heat thoroughly until all ingredients are well combined. Garnish with parsley and serve. Makes four servings.
